🧹 Project Cleaner

Deletes unused footage, comps, and empty folders silently.

🖥️ Smart Comp Rescaler

Resize compositions and scale all layers & keyframes proportionally.

🎵 Beat-Sync Marker Gen

Analyze audio tracks and auto-generate beat markers.

80%
sec

Note: To use these Text Animation features, you will need to use Adobe After Effects 25 or above.

Enjoy the viral style caption

Bottom to Up

Moves bottom to top.

Viral caption

Up to Bottom

Moves top to bottom.

Viral caption

Left to Right

Slides left to right.

Viral caption

Right to Left

Slides right to left.

Viral caption

Blink

Viral caption

Bounce bottom to top.

Regular caption

Regular caption

Regular caption

Note: To use these Presets features, you will need to use Adobe After Effects 25 or above.

⚡ DD Smooth Elastic

Premium natural damping elastic keyframe overshoot.

🏀 DD Damped Bounce

Complex bounce expression with high elastic decay.

Note: To use these Templates features, you will need to use Adobe After Effects 25 or above.

💼 DD Minimal Lower Third

Self-resizing minimalist text background template.

Appearance Settings

Accent Color

×

MotionXPart is a free resource plugin for After Effects, created by Mohammad Hridoy — a Motion Graphics Designer and Video Editor who has been working full-time in this field since 2021.

He built this plugin to make the everyday tasks in After Effects faster and easier for everyone. He is constantly working to bring more updates and new features to the plugin over time.

If you want to request some extra additions in the future or have any recommendations, then mail me at motionxpart@gmail.com

If you like my work, you can support me here:

×

Select Animation

Tip: L is for large phrase, S is for small phrase.

Choose an effect for your captions

Save Expression

Enter a short name for your expression button.

Caption Editor

Enter the client or project name.

Save MXcomp

Enter the name and category for the animation template.

Standard features are 100% free! Request access here only to unlock the premium DD Exclusive features.
